mapper.select:
/* 캘린더 생성 (검색 기간만큼의 빈 달력 생성) */ WITH RECURSIVE calendar AS ( SELECT
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, '-01-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
AS m_date
UNION ALL
SELECT
DATE_ADD(m_date, INTERVAL 1 YEAR)
DATE_ADD(m_date, INTERVAL 1 MONTH)
FROM calendar WHERE
m_date < STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, '-01-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
m_date < STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')
),
/* 실제 데이터 집계 (질문당 최초 COMP 기준, 중복 제거) */ stat_data AS ( SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y')
DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y-%m')
AS join_date , COUNT(*) AS answer_cnt FROM ${schema}.bbs_pst tbbp INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs b ON tbbp.bbs_oid = b.bbs_oid INNER JOIN ( SELECT reply.up_bbs_pst_oid, MIN(tbh.reg_dt) AS final_comp_dt FROM ${schema}.bbs_hstry tbh INNER JOIN ${schema}.bbs_pst reply ON tbh.tbl_oid = reply.bbs_pst_oid WHERE tbh.tbl_nm = 'bbs_pst' AND tbh.stts = 'COMP' AND reply.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NOT NULL AND reply.del_yn = 'N' GROUP BY reply.up_bbs_pst_oid ) hist ON tbbp.bbs_pst_oid = hist.up_bbs_pst_oid WHERE tbbp.up_bbs_pst_oid IS NULL AND tbbp.del_yn = 'N' AND b.bbs_se_cd = 'QNA' AND b.stats_yn = 'Y' AND b.use_yn = 'Y'
/* 검색 기간 필터 (최초 답변 완료일 기준) */ AND hist.final_comp_dt >=
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, '-01-01 00:00:00'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{startDate}, '-01 00:00:00'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
AND hist.final_comp_dt <=
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, '-12-31 23:59:59'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(LAST_DAY(STR_TO_DATE(CONCAT(#{endDate}, '-01'), '%Y-%m-%d')), ' 23:59:59'), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s')
GROUP BY
DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y')
DATE_FORMAT(hist.final_comp_dt, '%Y-%m')
)
/* 최종 조회 (캘린더 Left Join) */ SELECT
DATE_FORMAT(c.m_date, '%Y')
DATE_FORMAT(c.m_date, '%Y-%m')
AS searchDate , IFNULL(sd.answer_cnt, 0) AS ansCnCnt FROM calendar c LEFT JOIN stat_data sd ON
DATE_FORMAT(c.m_date, '%Y') = sd.join_date
DATE_FORMAT(c.m_date, '%Y-%m') = sd.join_date
ORDER BY c.m_date ASC
